mapper.select: SELECT cl.id AS link_id, cl.link_type, cl.target_type, cl.target_id, cl.source_type, cl.source_id, cl.note, cl.created_at, CASE cl.target_type WHEN 'WORD' THEN w.word WHEN 'PHRASE' THEN p.phrase WHEN 'PARAPHRASE' THEN pg.core_expression WHEN 'PRONUNCIATION' THEN pp.title WHEN 'GRAMMAR_POINT' THEN gp.title END AS target_summary, CASE cl.target_type WHEN 'WORD' THEN w.definition_zh WHEN 'PHRASE' THEN p.meaning_zh WHEN 'PARAPHRASE' THEN pg.synonyms WHEN 'PRONUNCIATION' THEN pp.category WHEN 'GRAMMAR_POINT' THEN gp.category END AS target_detail FROM ielts_content_links cl LEFT JOIN ielts_words w ON cl.target_type = 'WORD' AND w.id = cl.target_id LEFT JOIN ielts_phrases p ON cl.target_type = 'PHRASE' AND p.id = cl.target_id LEFT JOIN ielts_paraphrase_groups pg ON cl.target_type = 'PARAPHRASE' AND pg.id = cl.target_id LEFT JOIN ielts_pronunciation_points pp ON cl.target_type = 'PRONUNCIATION' AND pp.id = cl.target_id LEFT JOIN ielts_grammar_points gp ON cl.target_type = 'GRAMMAR_POINT' AND gp.id = cl.target_id WHERE cl.source_type = #{sourceType} AND cl.source_id = #{sourceId,jdbcType=OTHER} ORDER BY cl.link_type, cl.created_at

SELECT cl.id AS link_id, cl.link_type, cl.target_type, cl.target_id, cl.source_type, cl.source_id, cl.note, cl.created_at, CASE cl.source_type WHEN 'LISTENING' THEN li.title WHEN 'READING' THEN ri.title WHEN 'WRITING' THEN wt.title WHEN 'SPEAKING' THEN st.title END AS source_summary, CASE cl.source_type WHEN 'LISTENING' THEN CAST(li.section AS VARCHAR) WHEN 'READING' THEN ri.training_type WHEN 'WRITING' THEN CAST(wt.task_number AS VARCHAR) WHEN 'SPEAKING' THEN CAST(st.part AS VARCHAR) END AS source_detail FROM ielts_content_links cl LEFT JOIN ielts_listening_items li ON cl.source_type = 'LISTENING' AND li.id = cl.source_id LEFT JOIN ielts_reading_items ri ON cl.source_type = 'READING' AND ri.id = cl.source_id LEFT JOIN ielts_writing_tasks wt ON cl.source_type = 'WRITING' AND wt.id = cl.source_id LEFT JOIN ielts_speaking_topics st ON cl.source_type = 'SPEAKING' AND st.id = cl.source_id WHERE cl.target_type = #{targetType} AND cl.target_id = #{targetId,jdbcType=OTHER} ORDER BY cl.source_type, cl.created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ielts_content_links (id, source_type, source_id, target_type, target_id, link_type, note, created_at) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceId,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{targetType}, #{targetId,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{linkType}, #{note}, #{createdAt})
